$comment: TEMPLATE / EXAMPLE for migrations/<project>/source-schema.json. This is a shape to follow, NOT a strict schema to validate against. Both the producer (rp-discovery) and the consumer (rp-mapper) are LLMs, so structure is a convention that prevents drift, not a hard contract. Keep the agnostic core stable across platforms; push platform quirks into the open `sourceMeta` blob.

sourceMeta.$comment: Open, platform-specific. Anything the agnostic core cannot hold goes here.

category.$comment: hierarchical=true MUST be set when any term has parent != 0. The Wix Blog category target is flat (FR-006), so this flag triggers the mapper's mandatory faithfulness-ledger entry. See Read contract → Hierarchical taxonomies.

parent.$comment: 0 = top-level; non-zero = nested under another category id

assumptions: Rate limit inferred from observed throttling; not advertised by the server.
unknowns: ACF custom fields appear in sample records but are absent from the OPTIONS schema.
